zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton於大約1343年出生在英國藍卡爾法爾頓時，他的父親Sir John II Harington of Farleton44歲，母親Katherine Banastre32歲。他於1369年8月1日之前與Isabel English在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1373年登記服兵役。他於1402年被列為esquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively)。他去世於1404年2月8日之前在英國藍卡爾梅林，埋葬在英國藍卡爾法爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton于大约1343年出生在英国藍卡爾法爾頓时，他的父亲Sir John II Harington of Farleton44岁，母亲Katherine Banastre32岁。他于1369年8月1日之前与Isabel English在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1373年登记服兵役。他于1402年被列为esquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively)。他去世于1404年2月8日之前在英国藍卡爾梅林，埋葬在英国藍卡爾法爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Harington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton was born about 1343, in Farleton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John II Harington of Farleton, was 44 and his mother, Katherine Banastre, was 32. He married Isabel English before 1 August 1369, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1373. In 1402, at the age of 60, his occupation is listed as esquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively). He died before 8 February 1404, in Melling, Lancashire, England, and was buried in Farleton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton est né environ 1343, à Farleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John II Harington of Farleton, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Katherine Banastre, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Isabel English avant 1 août 1369, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1373. En 1402, à l’âge de 60 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est esquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively). Il est décédé avant 8 février 1404, à Melling, Lancashire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Farleton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton um 1343 in Farleton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John II Harington of Farleton 44 und seine Mutter Katherine Banastre 32. Er hat vor 1. August 1369 in Lancashire, England Isabel English geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1373 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1402, als er 60 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als esquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively) aufgeführt. Er starb vor 8. Februar 1404 in Melling, Lancashire, England und wurde in Farleton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton è nato il circa 1343 nel Farleton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John II Harington of Farleton, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Banastre, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Isabel English prima del 1 agosto 1369, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1373. Nel 1402, all'età di 60 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come esquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively). Morì prima del 8 febbraio 1404, nel Melling, Lancashire, England, e fu sepolto a Farleton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Harington of Farletonが約1343年にイギリスランカシュアイアファルレトンで生まれた時，父Sir John II Harington of Farletonは44歳，母Katherine Banastreは32歳であった。1369年8月1日以前にイギリスランカシュアイアでIsabel Englishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1373年に兵役登録をした。1402年，60歳の時，職業はesquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively)と記録されている。彼は1404年2月8日以前にイギリスランカシュアイアメリングで死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアファルレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton(이)가 대략 1343년 영국 랭카실르 패를레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John II Harington of Farleton(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Banastre(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1369년 8월 1일 이전 영국 랭카실르에서 Isabel English(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1373년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1402년, 60세의 나이로 그의 직업은 esquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively)이었다. 그는 1404년 2월 8일 이전 영국 랭카실르 멜링에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 패를레턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton nasceu aproximadamente 1343, em Farleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John II Harington of Farleton, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Banastre, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel English antes 1 de agosto de 1369, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1373. Em 1402, com 60 anos, sua profissão aparece como esquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively). Ele faleceu antes 8 de fevereiro de 1404, em Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Farleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton родился около 1343 г. в местности фарлетон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John II Harington of Farleton было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Banastre, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel English перед 1 августа 1369 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1373 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1402 году, в возрасте 60 лет, работал по профессии esquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively). Он умер перед 8 февраль 1404 г. в местности меллинг, ланкашир, Англия и был похоронен в местности фарлетон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas Harington of Farleton nació aproximadamente 1343, en Farleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John II Harington of Farleton, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Katherine Banastre, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Isabel English antes de 1 de agosto de 1369, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1373. En 1402, a la edad de 60 años, su ocupación registrada era esquire (nicholas haryngton the younger and his brother, james, were both retained as esquires by henry iv at fees of ¹10 p.a. and ¹20 p.a. respectively). Murió antes de 8 de febrero de 1404, en Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Farleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
